data.body:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/red-test-writer.yaml` agent profile that routes RED test tasks to `dso:red-test-writer`. Keywords must outscore test-automator for RED-specific patterns.

Profile structure:
- agent_type: dso:red-test-writer
- model: default=sonnet, complex=sonnet
- Strong keywords: RED:, create-test, modify-existing-test, behavioral test, failing test, RED test, red-test-writer
- Moderate keywords: test_approach, assert on output, exit code, side effects
- Negative keywords: fix:, bug:, refactor
- min_score: 3 (same as test-automator)
- base_priority: 5 (higher than test-automator's 4 to win ties)

Also update test-cases.yaml with the new RED routing test scenarios from Task 1.

## File Impact
- CREATE: plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/red-test-writer.yaml
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/test-cases.yaml (if not already modified by Task 1)

## TDD Requirement
Depends on Task fd1c-fc13 (RED). After creating this profile, RED tests must pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Profile exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/red-test-writer.yaml
- [ ] Profile routes to dso:red-test-writer
  Verify: grep -q 'dso:red-test-writer' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/red-test-writer.yaml
- [ ] RED routing tests now pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-classify-task.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_red_create_test_routes_to_red_test_writer.*PASS'
